report:
Based on the data, **you don't have any enrolled courses yet**. The course_wise_segregations table shows no records for your user ID, which means you haven't been enrolled in any courses through the platform.

**Total time spent on Data Structures: 0 hours 0 minutes**

Since you don't have any enrolled courses, there's no time tracking data available for Data Structures or any other courses. You'll need to be enrolled in courses first before time spent on them can be tracked.

**What you can do next:**
1. Contact your administrator or trainer to get enrolled in Data Structures courses
2. Once enrolled, your time spent on practice sessions, assessments, and coding exercises will be tracked automatically
3. You can then check your progress and time analytics

Would you like to know about available Data Structures courses in the platform catalog?
sql:
SELECT 
    c.course_name,
    cws.type,
    CASE cws.type 
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Prepare' 
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Assessment' 
    END as mode,
    cws.time_spend as total_seconds,
    CONCAT(FLOOR(cws.time_spend/3600), 'h ', FLOOR(MOD(cws.time_spend,3600)/60), 'm') as time_display,
    cws.progress,
    cws.score
FROM course_wise_segregations cws
JOIN courses c ON cws.course_id = c.id
WHERE cws.user_id = 902 
    AND cws.status = 1
    AND c.course_name LIKE '%Data Structure%'
ORDER BY c.course_name, cws.type;
SELECT 
    c.course_name,
    cws.type,
    CASE cws.type 
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Prepare' 
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Assessment' 
    END as mode,
    cws.time_spend as total_seconds,
    CONCAT(FLOOR(cws.time_spend/3600), 'h ', FLOOR(MOD(cws.time_spend,3600)/60), 'm') as time_display,
    cws.progress,
    cws.score
FROM course_wise_segregations cws
JOIN courses c ON cws.course_id = c.id
WHERE cws.user_id = 902 
    AND cws.status = 1
    AND (c.course_name LIKE '%Data%' OR c.course_name LIKE '%DS%' OR c.course_name LIKE '%Structure%')
ORDER BY c.course_name, cws.type;
SELECT 
    c.course_name,
    cws.type,
    CASE cws.type 
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Prepare' 
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Assessment' 
    END as mode,
    cws.time_spend as total_seconds,
    CONCAT(FLOOR(cws.time_spend/3600), 'h ', FLOOR(MOD(cws.time_spend,3600)/60), 'm') as time_display,
    cws.progress,
    cws.score
FROM course_wise_segregations cws
JOIN courses c ON cws.course_id = c.id
WHERE cws.user_id = 902 
    AND cws.status = 1
ORDER BY c.course_name, cws.type;
